description_long: This is a rugged, compact SUV with a camouflage paint scheme, featuring a boxy body and angular lines reminiscent of military or off-road vehicles. The exterior is primarily covered in green and brown camouflage with black accents, including the wheel arches, bumpers, and window trim. The vehicle has a roof rack for carrying additional cargo, and the windows are tinted dark for privacy and sun protection. The front end is equipped with a sturdy grille, two headlights, and a reinforced bumper, while the rear has a large window and a spare tire mount. The wheels are robust with thick, all-terrain tires and multi-spoke black rims, suitable for both urban and off-road environments.
description: A compact, boxy SUV with green and brown camouflage paint, black trim, roof rack, and rugged all-terrain wheels.
description_view_0: Rear and front three-quarter view showing the camouflage paint, roof rack, rear window, and robust bumper details.
description_view_1: Side and rear three-quarter view highlighting the angular body, tinted windows, and the full length of the roof rack.
description_view_2: Direct rear and front view displaying the grille, headlights, rear window, and the symmetry of the vehicle's design.
description_view_3: Side view emphasizing the SUV's compact length, wheel design, and the pronounced fender flares.
attribute_wheel_design: Five thick black spokes with a rugged, utilitarian finish
